response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the performance of a song on a virtual stage by FuwaMoco. 2. Identified the song title as 'Kiss me 抱いてる' from the on-screen text at the 01:40 timestamp. 3. Used DuckDuckGo to search for this song and lyrics but found no direct match for an official lyrics page, only covers of the 'Sixpence None the Richer' song. 4. Concluded the song is an original by the performers. 5. Set lyric fields to null as they could not be reliably found via search.
response.global_summary: A 3D virtual concert performance by FuwaMoco and other characters, singing an original Japanese song titled 'Kiss me 抱いてる'.

scenes.description: Virtual concert performance with multiple characters on stage, singing 'Kiss me 抱いてる'. The performance includes dance choreography and stage effects.
